content: Dexie.js 4.4.4 with dexie-react-hooks 4.4.0. Pattern: define TypeScript interface, cast new Dexie() instance as Dexie & { table: EntityTable<Type,'id'> }, call version(1).stores(). Export db singleton. useLiveQuery from dexie-react-hooks provides reactive live queries. No @types package needed. schema syntax: '++id, name, age' for auto-increment primary key plus indexed fields. Location and Medicine as separate tables with schema-versioned migrations.
